ref_point.type_4: swRefPointTypeInCentreOfFace -- creates centroid point on selected face
ref_point.vertex_note: type=4 does NOT work on vertices (face-only). Vertex ref-point may need a different type or be redundant.

dome.detail: InsertDome returns None in all tested configs (face selected, sketch on face, typed doc). Feature-recipe wall, not selection.

rib.detail: InsertRib returns None despite face selection. Likely needs sketch-on-face + specific arg tuning.

wrap.detail: InsertWrapFeature2 returns None despite face selection. Likely needs sketch-on-face.

interpretation: ENTITY-SELECT WALL CRACKED. typed persist round-trip (body.GetFaces -> GetPersistReference3 -> GetObjectByPersistReference3 -> typed(IEntity).Select2) achieves live selection of faces/edges/vertices out-of-process. InsertReferencePoint(4, 0, 0.0, 1) on a typed face selection MATERIALIZES a centroid reference point (ref_point GREEN). InsertDome/InsertRib/InsertWrapFeature2 still return None -- feature-recipe walls (wrong args or missing preconditions like sketch-on-face), NOT selection walls.

entity_select_mechanism.recipe: body = doc.GetBodies2(0, True)[0]; faces = body.GetFaces(); ext = typed_extension(doc); pid = ext.GetPersistReference3(face); live = ext.GetObjectByPersistReference3(pid)[0]; typed(live, "IEntity").Select2(False, mark)  # returns True

handler_recipe.ref_point: def _create_ref_point(doc, fm, mod): body = doc.GetBodies2(0, True)[0]; faces = body.GetFaces(); ext = typed_extension(doc, module=mod); pid = ext.GetPersistReference3(faces[0]); live = ext.GetObjectByPersistReference3(pid); live = live[0] if isinstance(live, tuple) else live; ient = typed(live, "IEntity", module=mod); doc.ClearSelection2(True); ient.Select2(False, 0); feat = fm.InsertReferencePoint(4, 0, 0.0, 1); if isinstance(feat, tuple): feat = feat[0]; return feat
